subject: fix(icons): update SVG icon colors to match DaisyUI dark theme
body:
Replace old hardcoded colors (#0f172a, #6366f1, #4f46e5, #818cf8,
#f59e0b) with DaisyUI dark theme colors derived from oklch values:
  - Background: #1d232a (base-100)
  - Primary nodes: #605dff (primary)
  - Info nodes: #00bafe (info)
  - Center node: #fcb700 (warning)
  - Connection lines: #605dff at 70% opacity (primary)

Updated both assets/icon-source.svg and public/icon.svg (SVG favicon).
Regenerated all 6 PNG icons from the updated source.

Tags: icons, theme, daisyui, colors
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
